The '''''Stalwart''-class light freighter''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] class in the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], more often seen in the core, and was competitive against the standard setting [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]].<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref><ref name="PAP" />

[[Karu Nelbin]]'s (later [[Callandri]]'s) ship, the ''[[Nightcast]]'', was a modified ''Stalwart'' [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]].<ref name="air" />
